title: Just Enough Random Stuff
description: just a bunch of random stuff from my adhd brain
body:
This is stuff that my brain that is spouting nonsense can make

There is a:
- Platinum Toolset
- An achievment for when you drink honey
- Redwood Forest (and redwood wood)
- Stealing Effect (does /clear on your inventory)
- Redblaze Armor (gives you fire resistance)
- McDonalds
- Mcdonalds Employee villager (White Concrete is their profession block)
